summary: This function is used to record comprehensive details of purchased items. It includes information about the vendor, payment method (e.g., cash), and allows for the upload of supporting purchase documents. It captures more than just the purchase bill.
steps: Enter details of the vendor (from whom the purchase was made).
Enter details of the purchased items, including quantities and costs.
Optionally, upload purchase documents (e.g., purchase bill).
business_rules: The purchase entry should detail all aspects of the purchase, not just the summary from a bill.
important_notes: The system allows for the upload of corresponding purchase documents for complete record-keeping.
questions: How do I record a purchase in the ERP system?
What details are included in a purchase entry?
Can I upload a purchase bill to the system?
How do purchase entries impact inventory stock levels?
